_comment: MASTER P3.2 + GAP-D (ADR-031). Renovate carries the deeper supply-chain cooldown for any package ecosystem this repo grows into (npm, pip, etc.). Config-ready: the operator installs the Renovate GitHub App to activate it (desk-gated). Until then Dependabot (.github/dependabot.yml) covers the GitHub Actions this repo actually pins.

packageRules._comment: GAP-D: a documented malware vector is auto-merging a freshly-published (possibly compromised) release. Nothing auto-merges here — the constitution forbids auto-merging anything that needs review — and every bump waits out the cooldown.
Security fixes still surface promptly, but a human still lands them (constitution Art. I §9).
